new_feedback.element: Judge one-vote weight label: streaming row uses a '½' glyph; halted row says 'weight 1/5'
new_feedback.issue: Inconsistent across states; '½' reads as one-half and contradicts the 1/5 weighting, making the judge look like it carries half the decision.
new_feedback.change: Drop the '½' glyph everywhere; use explicit '1/5' (or '1 of 5') identically in all three states.

new_feedback.element: Top-right cost meter THIS RUN / LAST ROUND / SESSION as three equal columns
new_feedback.issue: Only THIS RUN vs $25.00 ceiling gates a halt, but it has no visual primacy or color shift as $4.18 approaches $25.00.
new_feedback.change: Give THIS RUN primacy (larger + thin inline progress bar like the right-rail ledger) with an amber>~70% / danger>~90% threshold so the meter warns before the hard stop.

new_feedback.element: Reconnecting-state header swaps SESSION column for 'LAST KNOWN 14:08:32Z'
new_feedback.issue: A column silently repurposes itself under a new meaning across the streaming→reconnecting transition; positional instability is a trust hazard on a second monitor.
new_feedback.change: Keep the SESSION column present but explicitly mark it stale (greyed, 'last known' caption) instead of swapping in a different metric.

new_feedback.element: ASR vs Detection chart shares one 0-1 axis for two opposite-meaning series
new_feedback.issue: Low ASR is good, high Detection is good; only the legend disambiguates which direction is 'bad'.
new_feedback.change: Add a directional cue per series ('ASR ↓ better', 'Detection ↑ better') or shade the danger zone (ASR above / Detection below 0.90) so 'getting worse' is pre-attentive.
